summary: Iteration 3 validates the new GoROAM Admin Panel. All 28 admin backend pytest cases pass (RBAC, stats, stays/packages CRUD, booking status update + delete, user/review listing). Frontend admin flow verified on mobile viewport (390x844): Profile shows 'Admin Console' for admin role only → /admin dashboard renders revenue hero (₹234,094), 4 stat cards (9 stays, 6 packages, 7 bookings, 4 users), manage rows. Stat cards navigate correctly to /admin/stays (Add new FAB + edit/delete buttons + stay form with category chips, price, capacity), /admin/packages (Add new FAB + day-by-day itinerary builder with Add day button), /admin/bookings (revenue summary, filter chips, status pills, delete), /admin/users (summary + user cards with bookings_count/wishlist_count + ADMIN role pill).

react_native_issues.issue: Metro console still spams `shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.` (cosmetic, no functional impact). Reported in iter 2 too.
Warning `props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents` from a third-party RN dep. Cosmetic only.

action_items: (Optional polish) Migrate theme.shadow.* in src/theme.ts to boxShadow for cleaner web console output.
Booking flow remains MOCKED as documented (creates booking directly without real payment). No fix needed unless real payment integration is requested.
critical_code_review_comments: admin_only dependency correctly returns 403 for non-admin and 401 when no token — verified by 12 parameterised RBAC tests.
All admin CRUD endpoints exclude MongoDB _id (projection or pop after insert) — verified in responses.
POST /api/admin/stays auto-generates id with prefix `stay-` + uuid4 hex[:8]; packages use `pkg-` prefix. Persistence verified via public GET /stays/{id} after create/update and 404 after delete.
GET /api/admin/bookings enriches each booking with user_name/user_email via a single batched users query (good — avoids N+1).
GET /api/admin/users excludes password_hash projection and computes bookings_count + wishlist_count per user.
Profile screen correctly gates the Admin Console CTA with `user?.role === 'admin'` so regular users never see it.
BookingStatusUpdate uses Literal[confirmed/cancelled/completed/pending] — invalid statuses return 422 as verified.

success_rate.backend: 100% (28/28 admin pytest, plus 26/26 from iter 2 still passing)
success_rate.frontend: 100% — full admin journey verified: login → profile → admin console → dashboard stats → stays list + form → packages list + form (itinerary) → bookings → users.

seed_data_creation: None destructive; tests use admin@auratravel.com/admin123 (seeded) and create TEST_-prefixed stays/packages/bookings/reviews that are deleted within the same test class.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin endpoints all under /api/admin/*, require Bearer token with role=admin. Frontend admin routes under /admin (index, stays, packages, bookings, users, stay-form/[id], package-form/[id]). testIDs: open-admin, stat-{stays|packages|bookings|users}, manage-{stays|packages|bookings|users}, add-stay, add-pkg, add-day, edit-{id}, delete-{id}, status-{id}, del-{id}, filter-{name}, save-btn, cat-{Category}, remove-day-{i}. Admin login: admin@auratravel.com / admin123.
rca_of_issue: No issues found in this iteration.
